notes: Exclamatory F0 should rise then fall
Question F0 should rise at end

text: I went to the store, bought some bread, and then walked home.
I went to the store — bought some bread — and then walked home.
I went to the store... bought some bread... and then walked home.
notes: Ellipsis longer pause with trailing F0

text: I went to the store; bought some bread; and then walked home.
The sun was setting, the birds fell silent, and a chill crept in.
The sun was setting — the birds fell silent — and a chill crept in.
The sun was setting... the birds fell silent... and a chill crept in.
The sun was setting; the birds fell silent; and a chill crept in.

notes: No quotation marks means no prosody shift

text: I can't believe it, she whispered.
